text.title: e2e-testing Output Contract
text.summary: Required directory shape and per-file invariants for a Playwright E2E project. Used by validate-e2e-testing.py to gate commits.

section.title: JSON Schema

example.code: e2e/ ├── playwright.config.ts # projects: [chromium, firefox]; retries: 2; trace: on-first-retry ├── fixtures.ts # extends test with testUser, authenticatedPage ├── pages/ │ ├── LoginPage.ts # class LoginPage { goto(); login(email, pwd); expectLoggedIn() } │ └── CheckoutPage.ts ├── helpers/ │ └── testData.ts # createTestUser(api, overrides) via POST /api/test/users └── checkout.spec.ts # tag @smoke @critical; uses authenticatedPage fixture
example.note: POMs use only getByTestId / getByRole. Specs assert via expect(locator), never waitForTimeout.
4 violations: CSS selector, dynamic ID, force:true, waitForTimeout. Validator exits 1.

list.item: Every locator goes through getByTestId / getByRole / getByLabel.
No occurrence of `waitForTimeout`, `force: true`, or raw CSS selectors.
Every spec file imports `test` from `./fixtures`, not from `@playwright/test` directly.
Critical-path tag (`@smoke` or `@critical`) appears on <=50 test cases.
At least one POM file under e2e/pages/ per route covered by specs.
